nasb.text: Then they shall take other stones and replace those stones, and he shall take other plaster and replaster the house.

esv.text: Then they shall take other stones and put them in the place of those stones, and he shall take other plaster and plaster the house.

cnv.text: 拿別的石頭放進去代替挖出來的石頭，然後用別的灰泥粉刷房屋。

ccb.text: 要另找石块补被拆掉的地方，并用灰泥重新粉刷房子。
